title: pelargonium × auriculiflorum
intro: Pelargonium × auriculiflorum, a hybrid species within the geranium family, is a flowering plant known for its medicinal and health benefits. This plant contains compounds with antiviral, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its therapeutic uses. The health benefits of Pelargonium × auriculiflorum include relief from cold and flu symptoms, as well as its potential to reduce stress and promote relaxation. In herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture to leverage its medicinal properties, and it can also be used in aromatherapy to promote a sense of calmness.
